LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ONE SOURCE PLUMBING, INC.'S JOINDER IN MOTION BY DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT WSM ENTERPRISES, INC. FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS. ARGUED AND THE COURT TOOK THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. AFTER HEARING THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED - MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS UNABLE TO SUE UNDER A RIGHT OF SUBROGATION DUE TO ITS INSURED'S INCAPICITY TO SUE. Off Calendar Jun-23-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Defendant's Counsel Robert Romero for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar and dissolved/Fes Paid. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings; Req. For Judicial Ntc
Off Calendar Apr-26-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT WSM ENTERPRISES, INC.'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS.

APPEARANCES: Christopher J. Brennan, Esq. of Bauman Loewe Witt & Maxwell 480/502-4664 for pltf & opposing party; Alyson M. Gleason, Esq. of Ericksen Arbuthnot 510/832-7770 for WSM Enterprises, Inc.; John T. Meno, Esq. of Hinshaw & Culbertson LLP 362-6000 for One Source Plumbing, Inc. (appearing via CourtCall).

RULING: Argued and the Court took the matter under submission.
After hearing the Court ruled as follows: Tentative ruling adopted - MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS UNABLE TO SUE UNDER A RIGHT OF SUBROGATION DUE TO ITS INSURED'S INCAPICITY TO SUE. FURTHERMORE, PLAINTIFF CANNOT MAINTAIN CLAIMS FOR NEGLIGENCE AND BREACH OF IMPLIED WARRANTY AGAINST THE DEFENDANTS ON ITS OWN. REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE COMPLAINT, CERTIFICATE OF STATUS AND CURRENT STATUS OF SUSPENSION IS GRANTED. WSM Enterprises, Inc.'s order signed. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

(Joinder) To Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Apr-26-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT ONE SOURCE PLUMBING, INC.'S JOINDER IN MOTION BY DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT WSM ENTERPRISES, INC. FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS.

APPEARANCES: Christopher J. Brennan, Esq. of Bauman Loewe Witt & Maxwell 480/502-4664 for pltf & opposing party; Alyson M. Gleason, Esq. of Ericksen Arbuthnot 510/832-7770 for WSM Enterprises, Inc.; John T. Meno, Esq. of Hinshaw & Culbertson LLP 362-6000 for One Source Plumbing, Inc. (appearing via CourtCall).

RULING: Argued and the Court took the matter under submission.
After hearing the Court ruled as follows: Tentative ruling adopted - MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS UNABLE TO SUE UNDER A RIGHT OF SUBROGATION DUE TO ITS INSURED'S INCAPICITY TO SUE. FURTHERMORE, PLAINTIFF CANNOT MAINTAIN CLAIMS FOR NEGLIGENCE AND BREACH OF IMPLIED WARRANTY AGAINST THE DEFENDANTS ON ITS OWN. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
